query: SELECT id, planType, trialStartDate, trialDays, NOW() AS current_time, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, trialStartDate, NOW()) AS minutes_elapsed, FLOOR(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, trialStartDate, NOW()) / 1440) AS days_elapsed, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, trialStartDate, NOW()) MOD 1440 AS remaining_minutes_in_day, GREATEST(0, trialDays - FLOOR(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, trialStartDate, NOW()) / 86400)) AS days_remaining, CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, trialStartDate, NOW()) >= (trialDays * 86400) THEN 'EXPIRADO' ELSE 'ATIVO' END AS trial_status, DATE_ADD(trialStartDate, INTERVAL trialDays DAY) AS expiration_date FROM establishments WHERE id = 30001;
